name: opening_gap_2pct_no_para_arm_cycle1
description: A symphony opens +2.0% on a new day (prev_return=None sentinel). Even though 2.0% equals the default PARABOLIC_VELOCITY_THRESHOLD, cycle-1 must NOT para-arm because true intraday velocity is 0 (we have no prior intraday observation to compute a meaningful delta). This fixture pins the E1 fix: opening gap must never count as PARA velocity.
derivation: sentinel None => effective_prev = 2.0. velocity = 0.0. 0.0 < 2.0 (threshold) => should_arm = False. para_armed stays False.
